scope: same-host Apple Silicon retained-Q8 short decode gate

method.prompt_cache: unique prompts; measured rows reported any_prompt_cache_hit=false
method.raw_outputs: Raw target/*.json files are intentionally not committed because they include local paths, process ids, device names, and host pressure samples.

measurements.label: old_implicit_hybrid_default_10_percent
measurements.mode: CAMELID_HYBRID_Q8_RETAINED unset under the previous macOS default-on behavior; effective GPU slice 10%
notes: Two-repeat sweep sample captured before changing the default.

measurements.label: explicit_cpu_only_sweep
notes: Two-repeat sweep sample captured in the same tuning session.

measurements.label: new_default_hybrid_off
measurements.mode: CAMELID_HYBRID_Q8_RETAINED unset after changing the default to off
notes: Three-repeat confirmation sample after the code/docs change.

decision.change: Default CAMELID_HYBRID_Q8_RETAINED to off; keep the CPU+Metal suffix scheduler available only as explicit opt-in.
decision.reason: The measured Metal suffix scheduler did not beat the paired retained-Q8 CPU path on this short 3B decode gate and carried higher RSS in the default 10% slice sample.

claim_boundary: This is a same-host tuning gate for the exact retained-Q8 3B row and short max_tokens=8 chat workload.
It is not a broad Metal performance claim and does not compare against MLX or llama.cpp.
The raw local benchmark JSON is excluded from git to avoid publishing local paths and host/device details.
